verdict.rationale: The Q1 2026 Operations Review reports period-end FTE of 142, while the claim states 143; the People Review's components (139 permanent + 18 contract = 157, or 139 alone) do not reconcile to 143 either, so no source supports the claimed figure.
verdict.suggested_action: Confirm the master document's 143 FTE figure against the Operations Review's 142 and correct whichever is in error.
